children.text: You need to verify that appcrawler5@gmail.com belongs to you. Learn more...
Hi San, invite other teachers to use Bloomz
Invite all class parents to join your classroom group on Bloomz.

All your class communications, including calendar events and reminders show up here, in one view (even a kindergartner can find information this way!) (By the way, see all the tools Bloomz can replace for you)
Everything posted here is private, between your teacher and class parents.
Help your teacher Post quick updates on what the kids are learning in class, or share a photo to help parents stay in the know
Make an announcement to remind parents about an upcoming tests or field trip.
Visit our support site to learn more about all the cool features in the app, get help on how the tools work, access how-to-guides and resources to help introduce Bloomz to class parents.
Visit our support site to learn more about all the cool features in the app, get help on how the tools work, access how-to-guides and resources to help introduce Bloomz to class parents.

All your communications, including calendar events and reminders from your child’s school, teacher/classroom, and your personal contacts will appear here, in one view.(see all the communication channels Bloomz can replace)
Post a quick update to ask your trusted parent community for advice or share a tip for kid-friendly activities, dinner recipes or summer camps.
Visit our support site to further explore Bloomz capabilities, access how-to-guides and resources to help introduce Bloomz to other parents and teachers.
A secure way to view and share School/Class memories!
Access and download photos from school events, extra curricular activities, field trips, added by your school, teachers and other parents.
Post photos from class, field trips and school events to give parents a window to their child’s world.
Upload photos from your camera and share it with your class community
Use any of the photos as the cover for your classroom page.
Photos added here are private, between you and your class parents.
Ping a parent or group of parents to chat when you need to reach them instantly
Send parents an alert in case of an emergency
Parents can chat with each other (or as a group) to organize carpools, schedule play dates, etc.
Are you sure want to decline?
Add an event to the calendar
Request signups for items or people
An Alert is normally used to communicate an urgent or important message. Continue or go back and pick a different type.
